Huge Tim Howard fan and roots for Brentford FC; his favorite book is 'Man’s Search for Meaning' by Viktor Frankl, showing a thoughtful side off the pitch.

Family full of athletes: brother Brandon captained soccer at Santa Clara, sister Brittany played volleyball there, mom Tiffiny was an All-American tennis player at UC Berkeley, and dad Chuck played football at Stanford.
Switched from field player to goalkeeper at 15 and never looked back—building his own awesome legacy!
Fan of Peaky Blinders and Rally Coffee in Omaha—what a cool mix of gritty drama and caffeine vibes.

Key player in Houston Dynamo's 2023 U.S. Open Cup triumph, scoring a brace in the quarterfinals and celebrating a major trophy in his debut MLS season.
Played every single minute of the 2024 MLS regular season—one of only 21 outfield players league-wide to do so—while co-winning the club's Golden Boot with 6 goals.
Started his journey with Oasis FC and Footwork FC in Nigeria before dazzling in Croatia at just 18, scoring 17 goals for Lokomotiva Zagreb.
Back with Houston after a stint with Columbus Crew, bringing his speed, goals, and versatility to light up Shell Energy Stadium again!
